description: arXiv:2606.29059v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: World modeling requires forecasting uncertain futures while preserving information useful for downstream perception. Existing visual world models often struggle to satisfy both goals: VAE-based stochastic models operate in low-dimensional reconstruction latents, which can limit perception performance, while deterministic predictors using...
author: Francois Porcher, Nicolas Carion, Karteek Alahari, Shizhe Chen
